contextual.title: Effect of Panax Ginseng on the Cognitive Performance in Alzheimer's Disease
contextual.text:
Summary: We investigate the clinical efficacy of Panax ginseng in Alzheimer's disease (AD).
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Alzheimer's disease 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 other neurologic disease

metadata.brief_title: Effect of Panax Ginseng on the Cognitive Performance in Alzheimer's Disease
metadata.brief_summary: We investigate the clinical efficacy of Panax ginseng in Alzheimer's disease (AD).

Alzheimer's Disease.definition: A degenerative disease of the BRAIN characterized by the insidious onset of DEMENTIA. Impairment of MEMORY, judgment, attention span, and problem solving skills are followed by severe APRAXIAS and a global loss of cognitive abilities. The condition primarily occurs after age 60, and is marked pathologically by severe cortical atrophy and the triad of SENILE PLAQUES; NEUROFIBRILLARY TANGLES; and NEUROPIL THREADS. (From Adams et al., Principles of Neurology, 6th ed, pp1049-57)

A degenerative disease of the BRAIN characterized by the insidious onset of DEMENTIA. Impairment of MEMORY, judgment, attention span, and problem solving skills are followed by severe APRAXIAS and a global loss of cognitive abilities. The condition primarily occurs after age 60, and is marked pathologically by severe cortical atrophy and the triad of SENILE PLAQUES; NEUROFIBRILLARY TANGLES; and NEUROPIL THREADS. (From Adams et al., Principles of Neurology, 6th ed, pp1049-57)
